summary: Frontend-only verification of section reorder + Toolkit vertical columns + Education section + 8 certifications (incl. Project Management/Google) + real resume asset. All targeted checks PASS. Resume asset served at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/Dhairya_Shah_Resume.pdf returns HTTP 200 with content-type application/pdf and length 99184 bytes. DOM section order verified via bounding rects: hero < about < experience < projects < education < skills < certifications < contact. Education (/ 04 EDUCATION) precedes Skills (/ 05 TOOLKIT); Certifications kicker is / 06; Contact is / 07. Toolkit renders exactly 4 vertical columns (skill-col-0..3) with labels Programming (4 items), Analytics (5), Softwares (5), BI / Vizz (3); items skill-Python, skill-Tableau, skill-SQL, skill-Power BI all present. Education shows 2 cards: M.S. Data Science / Stevens / May 2026 / GPA 3.73 and B.Tech IT / K.J. Somaiya / Graduated with Distinction / GPA 3.62. Certifications list has exactly 8 items with cert-3 Data Visualization, cert-4 Big Data (UC San Diego), cert-5 Exploratory Data Analysis, cert-6 Sequences Time Series & Prediction, cert-7 Project Management (Google) all pointing to the exact expected verify URLs. Hero h1 uses class 'font-name' (Instrument Serif italic); Dhairya Shah renders without layout breakage. Resume button href = /Dhairya_Shah_Resume.pdf. Contact form submits and success toast 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.' appears. Zero console errors, zero page errors on load and after interactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio.jsx correctly renders Education before Skills.
Skills.jsx uses grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 with flex-col item lists — matches vertical columns spec.
CERTIFICATIONS array has exactly 8 entries with correct verify links; cert-4 (Big Data / UC San Diego) and cert-2 (Big Data & Machine Learning / Google Cloud) are distinct — no collision.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real resume PDF is 99184 bytes at /app/frontend/public/Dhairya_Shah_Resume.pdf and served OK by preview URL. Hero uses font-name utility class (Instrument Serif italic) — text content is 'DhairyaShah' split across two MaskLine spans. Skill columns labels are uppercased by CSS (.mono-label) — compare case-insensitively. Two 'Big Data' entries exist in certifications (cert-2 Google Cloud, cert-4 UC San Diego) — use full name or index for exact matching. Contact toast text is 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.'
